what_it_does: Records an attachment ledger entry that links the design-source channel to an image asset at image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-06.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no prose body.
The target is an image:// URI pointing to design-source/deck1-2026/p-06.
It includes an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
The id follows the att- prefix pattern: att-b4c91698.
standouts: It is a bare metadata record with no content body.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Id prefix 'att-' with a hash suffix.
Channel-memory attachments stored as individual markdown files.
Uses an image:// URI scheme for asset targeting.
concerns: No body or explanatory context beyond metadata.
The image:// target cannot be verified or resolved from this file alone.
No author, message reference, or provenance beyond the timestamp.
No MIME type, dimensions, or alt text for the image.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that ties the design-source channel to the deck1-2026/p-06 image asset.
questions: What message or content in the design-source channel uses this attachment?
What is the content or purpose of deck1-2026?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is an attachment metadata record and contains exactly the metadata needed to identify the channel, type, target image, and addition time.
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog and make retrievable an image asset attached to the design-source channel, likely for reference in design discussions or documentation.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel and an image asset, which a fused system can use to locate or associate visual design material without needing to inspect the image itself.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment ledger record att-b4c91698 maps the design-source channel to image asset deck1-2026/p-06 via an image:// URI and records when it was added.
intention_for_embedding: Record that an image from deck1-2026 page 06 was attached to the design-source channel.
